keywords.name: extra
keywords.description: extra variable for array index i

keywords.name: state
keywords.description: The plasticity indicators for tetrahedrons are set to i . Normally the value of i used is 0 in order to reset the failure indicators.

keywords.name: zz
keywords.description: WARNING - this command only initializes zone stress. To initialize both zone and contact stress use block insitu . xx -component of stress xy -component of stress xz -component of stress yy -component of stress yz -component of stress zz -component of stress

keywords.name: minimum
keywords.description: WARNING - this command only initializes zone stress. To initialize both zone and contact stress use block insitu . Direction of intermediate principal stress. Direction of maximum principal stress. Direction of minimum principal stress. Intermediate principal stress magnitude. Maximum (most postitive) principal stress. Minimum (most negative) principal stress.

keywords.name: kwd:add
keywords.description: Add the specified value to the existing value.

keywords.name: kwd:gradient
keywords.description: Apply a gradient to the scalar-value provided.

keywords.name: kwd:multiply
keywords.description: Multiply the existing value by the specified value.

keywords.name: kwd:vary
keywords.description: Apply a linear variation to the scalar-value provided.
